input.task: Write a SQLite query returning the run_id of the run currently waiting on a human approval.
input.context: Smithers run-history DB at .smithers/state/fixture-ops.db (relative to repo root), real schema: _smithers_runs(run_id, workflow_name, status, created_at_ms, finished_at_ms, error_json); _smithers_nodes(run_id, node_id, iteration, state, label) state in finished|failed|running|pending; _smithers_events(run_id, seq, type, payload_json) type in run_started|node_finished|node_failed|approval_requested; _smithers_approvals(run_id, node_id, status); _smithers_scorers(run_id, node_id, scorer_name, score).
